items.title: New Jersey mayor charged with trespassing at detention center | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>New Jersey's Newark Mayor Ras Baraka has been released from custody several hours after being arrested on a charge of trespassing at a privately run federal immigration detention center while three US lawmakers were on site for an unannounced inspection.
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #newjersey #unitedstates #immigration

items.title: Darren Criss wants to see all Tony-nominated shows
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Tony-nominated actor Darren Criss, who plays an obsolete 'helper' robot pining for his former owner in "Maybe Happy Ending," tells Reuters that he aims to see all of the Tony-nominated Broadway shows, a particular challenge as Criss' show is still running and most Broadway shows follow the same schedule.
 
#TonyAwards #TonyNominations #Broadway #Reuters #MaybeHappyEnding #DarrenCriss

items.title: California firefighters torch demo homes to show fire season safety | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Various California fire agencies gathered for a fiery demonstration to show the importance of fireproofing homes as part of Wildfire Preparedness Week. Firefighting personnel said they are preparing for another potentially dangerous wildfire season after the Eaton and Palisades fires that destroyed thousands of properties.

#firefighters #California #wildfire #fireproofing #fireseason #fireagencies #News #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: Pentagon upheaval
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Pete Hegseth came into the job as U.S. defense secretary vowing reform. The unprecedented staff cuts he says are designed to maximize "strategic readiness" have instead created an air of fear and distrust, according to insiders. Some military experts warn they could handicap operations. Pentagon reporters Idrees Ali and Phil Stewart join the podcast to discuss the state of America's military.
